a.xlink:title: Slot called by the worker when an image is loaded. Inserts the pixmap into the cache and emits pixmap...
Emits the pixmapUpdated signal on the underlying CardInfo.
Returns a reference to the underlying CardInfo object.
Convenience helper to get the card's display name.
Generates a stable cache key for pixmap caching.
Creates a new instance with only the card name.
Returns a version of the card name safe for file storage or fuzzy matching.
Returns the printing information associated with this card.
Retrieves the value of a specific property.
Returns the set this printing belongs to.
Returns the providerID for this printing.
